We took a look at the brand’s 65W Nexode Air ultra-mini USB-C GaN charger a few weeks back, and we’re now checking out the ultra-slim 45W Nexode Air model. This is easily the slimmest charger I have in my EDC right now, and it’s compact enough to slip into just about any of my pockets or bags. While it doesn’t quite match the 65W charging speeds of the other variant I tested earlier, I’ve found myself reaching for this slimmer one more often over the past few weeks simply because it’s so easy to carry around. Your afternoon lineup of the best Android game and app deals is now ready to roll, including titles like Demon Castle Story, Legends of Heropolis DX, Game Dev Story, Dungeon Village 2, Pocket Academy 3, Chloe Puzzle Game Pro, Shadow Hunter: Offline Premium, The Ramen Sensei, and more. We also have the regularly $180 Google Nest Doorbell starting down at $73 joined by ongoing deals on Google Pixel 10 series phones at up to $615 off as well as Lenovo’s 2026 Yoga Slim 7x Copilot+ PCs at up to $427 off and Acer’s 2025 model Chromebook Plus 516 laptop down at $319. The apps await below.

items.title: It’s back! Grab Fanttik’s Apex 3-in-1 digital tape measure with USB-C charging for $80 (Reg. $130)
items.summary:
Fanttik A10 Apex 3-in-1 Digital Laser Tape Measure

Buy for $80 (Reg. $130)

What we love

This unit from Fanttik wears several different hats, functioning as a physical tape measure, digital model with millimeter accuracy, as well as a green cross-line laser that provides “precise leveling and alignment.” As usual, this tool is refueled via USB-C, making it a cinch to keep topped off.

items.title: Score up to 42% Early Prime Day savings on Beatbot robot pool cleaners to new + returning lows starting from $399
items.summary:
Beatbot has officially kicked off its Early Prime Day Sale event that is currently offering up to 42% discounts across its robot pool cleaner lineup – and we’re seeing many new low prices as a result. One such lower price is hitting the brand’s latest Sora 70 Robotic Pool Cleaner for $1,099 shipped, which matches the price direct from the brand’s website. Down from $1,499, this new robot has only been on the market for a handful of months now, with the discounts we’ve been seeing up until now only going as low as $1,149 back during the May Anniversary Sale. Now, you’ll be getting an even larger $400 markdown that carves out a new all-time low price, which is handy considering pools will be in frequent use soon, especially with summer vacations beginning soon for kids. You can learn more about this particular robot cleaner in our hands-on review, or head below to shop the full lineup of deals.
